title: crepis aurea var. columnae
intro: Crepis aurea var. columnae, also known as the autumn hawk's beard, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help alleviate symptoms of various health issues. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Crepis aurea var. columnae can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although proper dosing and preparation should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
